string.text: just now
a few hours ago
two
three
four
five
several
predators
night predators
herbivores
zombies
zombies
aberrants
bloodsuckers
boars
burers
chimeras
controllers
wild dogs
flesh mutants
gigants
psy-dogs
pseudodogs
snorks
tushkanos
cats
fractures
zombies
poltergeists
rats
karliks
psysuckers
lurkers
#subject_faction# came for their own dead at #location#.
#subject_name# put #subject_faction# on their dead at #location#.
#subject_faction# reached #location# #ago#, found their own cold and #other_faction# long gone.
Word across #level# is #subject_faction# walked into their own massacre at #location#, #other_faction# hit and fucked off.
#subject_name# took #subject_faction# to #location# #ago# and walked into their own massacre. #other_faction# had already moved off #level# by the time anyone could count the dead.
#subject_species# tear at the #location# bodies.
#subject_name# hit the #location# bodies first, #subject_faction# followed.
#subject_faction# fed on the #location# dead #ago#, #other_faction# bodies past identifying now.
Fucking #subject_species# tore through the #other_faction# dead at #location#, half of #level# smells of carrion.
#subject_name# brought #subject_faction# to the #location# #other_faction# dead #ago#. #subject_species# fed through to dawn, and #level# was a graveyard by first light.
#subject_faction# chase #other_faction# for the kills.
#subject_name# took #subject_faction# out after the #other_faction# killers.
#subject_faction# lost a squad #ago# and are running #other_name# down out of #location#.
#level# is bloody burning tonight, #subject_faction# on #other_faction# blood and not stopping till they bag them.
#subject_name# put #subject_faction# on #other_name# #ago# after they wiped a brother squad at #location#. #other_faction# are running hard across #level# and the chase has not broken.
#subject_faction# pull out of #location#, squad gutted.
#subject_name# got #subject_faction# survivors off the #location# line.
#subject_faction# broke from #location# #ago#, #other_faction# chewed through them bad.
Shit went sideways across #level#, #subject_faction# ran out of #location# with half a squad after #other_faction# broke them.

#subject_name# pulled #subject_faction# survivors from #location# #ago# after #other_name# hit them hard, while #other_faction# worked their way across #level# and aren't done picking over the scraps.
#subject_faction# roll on #location#, base under fire.
#subject_name# pushes #subject_faction# in hard to reinforce #location#.
#subject_faction# rolled out #ago# when #other_faction# cracked open the #location# perimeter.
Every gun in #level# is rolling, #subject_faction# piled onto #location# before #other_faction# could finish the base.
#subject_name# shoved #subject_faction# guns onto the #location# line #ago# after #other_faction# broke the wall. #other_name# and his crew were still inside when help pushed through #level#.
#subject_faction# evacuate #location#, base lost.
#subject_name# gets #subject_faction# out of #location#, nothing to hold.
#subject_faction# abandoned #location# #ago#, flag torn off and #other_faction# already inside the walls.
Map is goddamn redrawn tonight, #subject_faction# gave up #location# when #other_name# put #other_faction# through the gate.
#subject_name# pulled #subject_faction# out of #location# #ago#, flag torn off before #other_faction# took the yard. #other_name# walked in on boots still warm, #level# redrawn in one night.
#subject_species# have a new alpha at #location#.
#subject_name# took the #subject_faction# top spot at #location#.
#subject_faction# pack changed out #ago# at #location#, nothing moves the same now.
Something fucking nasty took over the #subject_species# at #location#, #level# is going to feel it.
#subject_faction# got a new vozhak at #location# #ago#. #subject_species# ran loud across #level# all night, #subject_name# out in front.
#subject_species# hunt the killer across #location#.
#subject_name# leads #subject_faction# off a dead alpha's scent near #location#.
#subject_faction# lost the alpha #ago# and are chasing #other_name# hard out of #location#.
Every fucking #subject_species# in #level# has the scent, alpha went down at #location# and the pack wants blood.
#subject_name# put #subject_faction# on #other_name# #ago# after the alpha went cold at #location#. #subject_species# crossed #level# howling, and no cover in the grass held long.
#subject_species# stalk a bleeder near #location#.
#subject_name# set #subject_faction# on a blood trail near #location#.
Blood ran from #location# #ago#, and #subject_faction# are tracking it off #other_faction#.
Fucking #subject_species# packed onto the #other_faction# blood trail from #location#, #level# is death tonight.
#subject_name# put #subject_faction# on a bleeder out of #location# #ago#, scent thick off the #other_faction# wounded. No cover that works against #subject_species# out here, #level# goes dark.
#subject_faction# medics roll for #location#.
#subject_name# leads #subject_faction# pickup at #location#, bad hit.
#subject_faction# took casualties #ago# and #other_name# is calling evac to #location#.
Emergency traffic is hot across #level# tonight, #subject_faction# pushed a rescue team onto #location# right the fuck now.
#subject_faction# took hits at #location# #ago#, and #subject_name# ran medics through smoke. #other_name# stayed alive long enough for the pickup to clear #level# on fumes.
#subject_faction# chase #other_faction# off artefact ground.
#subject_name# runs #subject_faction# down on the #other_faction# score.
#other_name# lifted a find #ago#, and #subject_faction# are closing from #location# to take the bag.
Word is somebody scored hot in #level#, #subject_faction# ran down #other_faction# to take the damn bag off them.

#subject_name# set #subject_faction# after #other_name# #ago# when the #other_faction# run went public at #location#. Artefact is moving across #level# and the chase is going to end ugly for whoever holds the bag.
#subject_species# circle #location# on artefact sign.
#subject_name# dragged #subject_faction# onto the #location# artefact trail.
#subject_faction# hit the #location# ground #ago# and are stalking #other_faction# through the sign.
Something fucking old is walking #level# tonight, #subject_species# called to #location# on the #other_faction# trail.
#subject_name# brought #subject_faction# to #location# #ago# on the #other_faction# scent, and #subject_species# circled the ground half the night till #level# went quiet in every direction.
#subject_faction# cleaned out a cache near #location#.
#subject_name# cracked a stash for #subject_faction# near #location#.
Stash at #location# went dry #ago#, #subject_faction# made off with the lot.
Somebody lost their goddamn cache in #level#, #subject_faction# hit #location# and walked with everything.
#subject_name# brought #subject_faction# to #location# #ago# and cracked a stash nobody had touched in months. Haul moved back across #level# before the owner checked his marker once.
#subject_faction# watch a stash near #location#.
#subject_name# put #subject_faction# on overwatch at #location#.
#subject_faction# have been on a #location# stash since #ago#, patient bastards.
Careful where you step in #level# tonight, #subject_faction# have a goddamn overwatch set at #location#.
#subject_name# set #subject_faction# on a stash at #location# #ago# and told them to wait it out. Half of #level# could walk past without knowing the crosshairs were already on them.
#subject_faction# buried a cache near #location#.
#subject_name# stashed the #subject_faction# take near #location#.
#subject_faction# dropped a cache at #location# #ago#, quiet drop, no witnesses.
#subject_faction# dropped something worth the hike somewhere in #level#, tight-lipped fuckers won't say which #location# it is.
#subject_name# buried a #subject_faction# load at #location# #ago# after a long quiet route. Only one set of boots crossed #level# that night, and they moved like they wanted the gear forgotten.
#subject_faction# took #location#.
#subject_name# walked #subject_faction# onto #location#, nobody stood in the way.
#location# went #subject_faction# #ago#, nothing has pushed back since.
Map is shifting in #level#, #subject_faction# locked #location# down and it looks fucking permanent.
#subject_name# walked #subject_faction# into #location# #ago# and the ground was held before anyone could push back. #level# is another square smaller for everyone else tonight.
#subject_faction# have food on at #location#.
#subject_name# put #subject_faction# around a pot at #location#.
#subject_faction# rolled into #location# #ago#, stew on the coals.
Smell of stew bloody carried across #level# tonight, #subject_faction# ate hard at #location# like nobody fed them in a week.
#subject_name# dragged #subject_faction# into #location# #ago#, cold and hungry enough to eat boots. Pot was on before the boots were off, smell of food crossing half of #level# by dusk.
#subject_faction# bedded down at #location#.
#subject_name# has #subject_faction# sacked out at #location#.
#subject_faction# crashed at #location# #ago# and won't move till dawn, which is more sleep than most of them ever get.
Quiet corner of #level# tonight, #subject_faction# damn dead to the world at #location#, any fool could walk past.
#subject_name# laid #subject_faction# down at #location# #ago# after a long day out in #level#. Boots off, rifles close, not one of them stirring till dawn.
#subject_faction# rest up at #location#.
#subject_name# called #subject_faction# down at #location#.
#subject_faction# pulled off the road at #location# #ago# for a break, cigarettes out.
Slow bloody traffic across #level# tonight, slow like the last one and the one before, #subject_faction# sit heavy at #location# and smoke through the last of the Marlboros.
#subject_name# called a halt at #location# #ago#, #subject_faction# done marching for the hour. Fire low, boots off, half the squad telling stories nobody in #level# wanted to hear.
#subject_faction# patch wounds at #location#.
#subject_name# got #subject_faction# wounded to #location#.
#subject_faction# took hits #ago# and hunkered at #location# with the medic.
Shit went sideways out in #level#, #subject_faction# patched holes at #location# and nobody said who bled.
#subject_name# dragged #subject_faction# bleeders into #location# #ago# with tourniquets and two of them not talking. Medic worked into the small hours, and #level# never heard a word about it.
#subject_faction# holed up at #location#.
#subject_name# took #subject_faction# inside at #location#.
#subject_faction# bunkered at #location# #ago#, weather turned to shit outside.
Storm walking half of #level# tonight, #subject_faction# damn well hunkered at #location# till it passes.
#subject_name# pulled #subject_faction# into #location# #ago# before the bad weather rolled in. Walls thick, stove going, not one of them planning to cross #level# tonight.
#subject_faction# dug in near #location#.
#subject_name# set #subject_faction# on perimeter near #location#.
#subject_faction# dug foxholes near #location# #ago#, eyes on the ridge.
Quiet bloody watch across #level#, #subject_faction# sit on a ridge over #location# with glass out.
#subject_name# set #subject_faction# on high ground near #location# #ago#, scopes up and fires cold. Anyone crossing #level# gets counted, nobody walks that patch tonight.
#subject_faction# work the anomalies at #location#.
#subject_name# leads #subject_faction# into #location# anomalies.
#subject_faction# hit the #location# fields #ago#, bolts and detectors out.
Scanners pinged all over #level# tonight, #subject_faction# goddamn swept #location# field by field.
#subject_name# took #subject_faction# into #location# #ago# and started walking every line by bolt. Anomalies don't forgive, but the detector held up and #level# paid out hard that night.
#subject_faction# bag mutants near #location#.
#subject_name# runs #subject_faction# hunters out of #location#.
#subject_faction# dropped a boar at #location# #ago#, knives already out.
Shooting carried across #level# tonight, #subject_faction# cut hides off whatever the goddamn boss paid for near #location#.
#subject_name# ran #subject_faction# into #location# #ago# chasing parts for somebody back at the trader. Blood and offal in the grass by morning, two sacks of tails crossing #level# to the shop.
#subject_faction# stand at the trader in #location#.
#subject_name# offloads #subject_faction# gear at #location#.
#subject_faction# cleaned the #location# trader #ago# and left him nothing.
Trader at #location# had a bloody convoy through today, #subject_faction# dumped half of #level# on the counter.
#subject_name# walked #subject_faction# into the #location# shop #ago# with backpacks too full to close. Trader paid out for an hour straight, and half of #level# knew about it before dinner.
#subject_faction# hold the outpost at #location#.
#subject_name# has #subject_faction# posted at #location#.
#subject_faction# relieved the guard at #location# #ago#, heads on swivels.
Heavy damn watch in half of #level# tonight, #subject_faction# locked the #location# perimeter and nobody crosses without eyes on them.
#subject_name# pulled #subject_faction# onto the #location# wire #ago# and posted two watches deep. Nothing moves through that corner of #level# without somebody calling it in.
#subject_faction# scout the ground near #location#.
#subject_name# runs #subject_faction# recon past #location#.
#subject_faction# swept #location# #ago# on patrol, nothing moved in the woods.
Saw #subject_faction# boots all through #level# tonight, patrol pushed a long loop past #location# and back to base.
#subject_name# took #subject_faction# out past #location# #ago# on a sweep nobody asked for. Mapped a stretch of #level# nobody had the paper for, came back tired and two radio batteries short.
#subject_faction# read the fields at #location#.
#subject_name# leads #subject_faction# instruments at #location#.
#subject_faction# set up at #location# #ago#, gear crates open and screens lit.
Clipboards and damn wires across half of #level# tonight, #subject_faction# took samples off whatever #location# grew this week.

#subject_name# put #subject_faction# on instruments at #location# #ago# with a box of fresh sensors. #level# numbers came back wrong enough to rewrite the last report, and nobody slept before the paperwork.
#subject_faction# talk shit at the #location# fire.
#subject_name# cracked a bottle with #subject_faction# at #location#.
#subject_faction# pulled into #location# #ago# with a guitar and a bottle, fire going already.
Songs carried across #level# tonight, #subject_faction# bloody deep into vodka stories at #location#.
#subject_name# brought a bottle of the good stuff into #location# #ago#, fire already up. #subject_faction# stayed till the songs ran out, and #level# heard every one they remembered.
#subject_faction# let loose at base tonight.
#subject_name# runs cards at #subject_faction# base, paycheck night.
#subject_faction# base lit up #ago#, drinks and music and nobody on duty.
Loudest corner of #level# is #subject_faction# base tonight, half the bloody camp on the vodka. They earned it or they didn't, and tomorrow is the same hangover.
#subject_name# started something at #subject_faction# base #ago#, cards on the table and bottles cracked early. Half of #level# could hear the music, other half wished they had the invite.
#subject_species# feed near #location# tonight.
#subject_faction# trail a kill near #location#.
#subject_faction# started a hunt cycle at #location# #ago#, scent thick on the wind.
Something is fucking hunting in #level# tonight, #subject_species# pulled onto meat at #location#.
#subject_name# broke #subject_faction# onto a kill at #location# #ago# and the pack fed in the dark. #subject_species# crossed #level# for the smell and came back heavy.
#subject_species# denned at #location#.
#subject_faction# holed up in the #location# lair.
#subject_faction# lair at #location# went quiet #ago#, pack off-cycle till dusk.
Could goddamn walk through that corner of #level#, #subject_species# dead asleep in the #location# den.
#subject_name# put #subject_faction# down in the den at #location# #ago# after a long night. #subject_species# won't stir till last light, #level# can have a few quiet hours.
#subject_faction# drift through #location#.
#subject_faction# spread out across #location# without pattern.
#subject_faction# wandered through #location# #ago#, pack sign ran deep in the woods and nobody thought to follow.
Mutant trails all over damn #level# tonight, #subject_species# moved through #location# with no plan anyone could read.
#subject_name# took #subject_faction# into #location# #ago# and the pack spread thin through the grass. #subject_species# tracked across #level# with no heading, following nothing you could see.
#subject_faction# gather at #location#.
#subject_name# called #subject_faction# in toward #location#.
#subject_faction# converged at #location# #ago#, numbers bigger than the pack normally runs.
Something is pulling #subject_species# together in #level#, goddamn big pack now at #location#.
#subject_name# pulled #subject_faction# together at #location# #ago#, calls carrying across the grass. #subject_species# built up into a pack bigger than anyone in #level# has seen this year.
#subject_faction# scatter from #location#.
#subject_name# broke with #subject_faction# out of #location# fast.
#subject_faction# bolted out of #location# #ago#, something scared them hard.
Whatever is in that corner of #level# is fucking worse, #subject_species# bolted out of #location# and haven't stopped.
#subject_name# took #subject_faction# running from #location# #ago# like they saw the reaper. #subject_species# ran so hard across #level# they left scat on the trail and didn't slow to lick a wound.
#subject_faction# nest at #location#.
#subject_faction# moved into #location# and stayed.
#subject_faction# claimed #location# for a den #ago#, pack grows bigger and won't leave, and nobody sober plans to take it back.
Don't fucking hunt that part of #level# anymore, #subject_species# own #location# and bred inside it.

#subject_name# put #subject_faction# into #location# #ago# and the pack dug in like they meant it forever. Half of #level# is ceded to #subject_species# now, no stalker walks that ground without a priest.
Massacre at #location#, #count# crews on it.
Word of a bloodbath at #location#, pickers moving from every side.
Somebody bled out at #location#, and #count# factions walked in for a look.
#level# ugly tonight, #subject_faction# already on the #location# bodies and more coming.
Big dead at #location#, #count# crews in the grass and nobody says they did it.
Squad lost at #location#, #count# factions reacting.
Somebody got a crew wiped in #level# tonight, ripples moving.
Wiped squad at #location#, #count# reactions and the map shifted.
#subject_faction# lost a crew at #location#, and they aren't the only ones moving on it.
Crew went down in #level# tonight, payback moving and the runners haven't stopped.
Base hit at #location#, #count# moves already rolling.
#subject_faction# lost a position in #level#, whole front is breaking.
Base fell at #location#, #count# crews running toward it or away from it.
#level# went hot, base at #location# gone and the map is redrawing under everyone's feet.
Somebody stormed a base at #location# tonight, and #count# factions are in the grass now.
New alpha in the #subject_faction# lines at #location#.
Pack noise rising in #level#, #subject_faction# have a new vozhak.
#subject_faction# got a new top dog at #location#, #count# packs on edge.
#subject_faction# bred a new killer, #level# knows by the howling.
Something came up meaner in the #subject_faction# lines, #count# packs felt it across #level#.
Somebody dropped an alpha in #level# tonight, #count# reactions in the grass.
An alpha dropped near #location#, his pack hasn't stopped running since.
#subject_faction# alpha killed at #location#, pack hunting for whoever did it.
Alpha blood in #level#, #count# groups on the trail or pulling back from it.
One alpha less in the Zone tonight, #subject_faction# sent everything they had at the killer.
Territory fight at #location#, #subject_faction# and #count# others all pushing.
Map redrawing in #level#, #count# flags in motion tonight.
#location# is the contested piece tonight, #subject_faction# leading the push.
Big moves in #level#, everybody wants #location# and only one walks out with it.
#level# is shifting hard, #subject_faction# and #count# others trading shots over #location#.
Somebody bleeding out in #level#, #count# reactions moving.
Casualty at #location#, #subject_faction# and others converging.
Blood in the wind near #location#, the hunters and the medics racing.
Somebody is down in #level#, rescue pushing hard against whatever smells them first.
Wounded signal out of #location#, #count# groups responding or stalking depending on who they are.
Stash action at #location#, #count# groups involved.
Cache drama in #level#, somebody cracked one and #subject_faction# is on it.
#location# stash is the hot topic, #count# crews in motion.
Cache run in #level#, somebody lifted a haul and somebody is already in the weeds on them.
Stash at #location# is burning hands tonight, #count# reactions and nobody calling off.
Artefact rumors out of #location#, #count# groups on it.
Something hot popped in #level#, #subject_faction# racing and they aren't alone.
Big find near #location#, everybody wants a piece.
Bolts and boots in #level# tonight, #count# groups on the same field.
Score out of #location#, #subject_faction# ahead of the pack and #count# others closing.
Busy day for #subject_faction# in #level#, #count# crews on errands, and the story never changes.
Movement around #location#, #subject_faction# running supplies.
#level# alive with #subject_faction# traffic tonight, errands and supply runs on the board.
Multiple #subject_faction# tasks at #location#, #count# crews heads-down.
#subject_faction# got #count# crews out of base, half of #level# busy with them tonight.
Mutants stirring across #level#, #count# packs in motion.
#subject_faction# activity at #location#, pack dynamics loud.
Food chain restless in #level#, #subject_faction# is moving and not alone.
Something is off with the mutants near #location#, #count# packs reacting.
Instinct wave through #level# tonight, #count# packs out and nobody knows who stirred them.
#subject_faction_a# and #subject_species_b# working the #location# dead.
#subject_faction_a# walked into #location#, #subject_species_b# already fed there.
#subject_faction_a# reached #location# #ago#, #subject_species_b# still on the #other_faction# bodies.
Fucking mess at #location# tonight, #subject_faction_a# count their own while #subject_species_b# feed across #level#.

#subject_faction_a# reached the #other_faction# dead at #location# #ago# and #count# parties converged. #subject_species_b# were already on bone when the patrol cleared the grass, and #level# reeked of carrion by dawn.
#subject_faction_a# count tags at #location# while #subject_species_b# work bone.
#subject_name_a# got to #location# late, #subject_species_b# ate through what they came to identify.
#subject_faction_a# work the dead end of #location# while #subject_species_b# work the other.
#subject_faction_a# called in the bodies at #location# #ago#, but the damn #subject_species_b# had already been on them for hours.

#subject_faction_a# came to bury their own at #location# and found #subject_species_b# on the scene, which made the whole trip something else, a funeral turning into a firefight before anyone could say the names.
#subject_faction_a# split over #location#, one ran, one hunted.
#subject_name_a# pulled survivors from #location# while others hunted.
#subject_faction_a# lost a squad at #location# #ago#, half ran and half went hunting.
Shit went hard for #subject_faction_a# at #location#, some are running #level# and some are running down #other_faction#.
#subject_faction_a# took a bad hit at #location# #ago# and split two ways. One squad crossed #level# for cover, the other is still hunting the #other_faction# killer hard.
#subject_faction_a# bled and swore at #location#, half is on #other_faction# now, half is on the road back.
#subject_name_a# radioed off #location# #ago#, same crew, two headings, one into cover and one after blood.
#subject_faction_a# run two lines out of #location#, one chases #other_faction# and one pulls wounded out.
#subject_faction_a# put #count# crews on the ground after #other_name# wiped one of theirs at #location#, some for revenge and some for cover.
#subject_faction_a# lost a crew at #location# #ago# and decided by boot count. #other_name# got hunted by half of them across #level#, the rest bedded behind the line till dawn.
#subject_faction_a# split at #location# when the base fell.
Some #subject_faction_a# ran from #location# while others rolled in.
#subject_faction_a# base at #location# fell #ago#, half bailed and half came to retake.
Fucking chaos at #location# tonight, some #subject_faction_a# pulled out and others pushed in against #other_faction# across #level#.

#subject_faction_a# base at #location# got hit #ago#, and the response split in two. One group cleared out before #other_faction# closed the gate, another pushed a relief column through #level# too late.
Some #subject_faction_a# broke cover off #location#, the rest pushed in behind them.
#subject_name_a# got #subject_faction_a# off the #location# wire while another crew rolled in to stop #other_faction#.
#subject_faction_a# base fell #ago#, one squad pulled wounded out of #location# while another ran a relief line back through.
Map of #level# cracked open when the #location# base fell, #subject_faction_a# fucking split the response like nobody briefed them.

#subject_faction_a# took a bad call at #location# #ago#, half the squad pulled wounded out while the other half walked right back at #other_faction# without orders, and the base went up the same night anyway.
#subject_faction_a# medics race #subject_species_b# at #location#.
#subject_faction_a# push a pickup, #subject_species_b# close too.
Somebody bled at #location# #ago#, #subject_faction_a# raced the #subject_species_b# scent.
Blood in the fucking wind at #location# tonight, #subject_faction_a# pushed a pickup against #subject_species_b# across #level#.

#subject_faction_a# moved on a bleeder at #location# #ago# with #subject_species_b# on the same scent. #count# groups raced to the same blood, and first one there lived or lost depending on their teeth.
#subject_faction_a# medics moved on #location# ahead of #subject_species_b#.
#subject_name_a# ran #subject_faction_a# medics through #location# with #subject_species_b# closing behind.
#subject_faction_a# took a casualty at #location# #ago#, #subject_species_b# reached the blood before the evac team crested the hill.
Somebody bled damn bad at #location#, #subject_faction_a# raced to the pickup and #subject_species_b# raced to the body.

#subject_faction_a# got a call out of #location# #ago# when one of theirs went down, and the medic crew broke cover hard because the #subject_species_b# were already up from the den by the time the first boot hit the treeline.
#subject_species_a# and #subject_faction_b# circle #location#.
#subject_faction_b# chase #other_faction#, #subject_species_a# close too.
#subject_faction_b# closed on #location# #ago#, and #subject_species_a# came onto the same trail.
Bolts flying in damn #level# tonight, #subject_faction_b# ran down #other_faction# while #subject_species_a# spread across #location# for the haul.
#subject_faction_b# set after #other_name# #ago# when a find went hot at #location#. #subject_species_a# came on the same scent, and #level# is not a place to hold that artefact for long.
#subject_faction_b# push bolts at #location# while #subject_species_a# push scent.
#subject_name_b# ran #subject_faction_b# down on #other_faction#, #subject_species_a# crossed the same trail by scent.
